productName: DBG Mini 5 pack-2.5g - Mandarin Cookies (Prince Farms) & Golden Pineapple (Grow Bros) (S) DOH
description: This infused hybrid pre-roll wraps Mandarin Cookies flower around a concentrate boost (think kief, hash, distillate, or diamonds) for a louder aroma and a longer session. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — with notes of citrus, orange, and pepper, delivering a versatile, anytime balance. Pace yourself.
